title: Affine Peel: Golfing a Reversible Permutation Circuit
strategies: structure-blind compute-swap-uncompute over the full-table ANF, one Toffoli per residue monomial per output bit (trivial = checker baseline)
same synthesis but sharing each residue monomial across output bits via a scratch wire (greedy)
peel the GF(2)-affine shell (b=P(0), M columns from P(e_i)), pay Toffolis only for the small triangular residue T=M^{-1}(P(.)^b) (strong)
true minimal weighted-gate synthesis: min-CNOT linear part + a possibly-cheaper residue factoring -- NP-hard, optimum unknown (open ceiling above strong)
